params.name: heading
params.description: Optional heading text shown above the body content.

params.name: headingHtml
params.description: Trusted HTML for the heading contents.

params.name: headingLevel
params.description: Semantic heading level for the optional heading. Defaults to 3.

params.name: variant
params.description: Feedback border variant: info, success, warning, or error.

params.name: background
params.description: Background variant: grey, yellow, or blue.

params.name: html
params.description: Trusted HTML content to be used within the inset text body.

params.name: HTML
params.description: Deprecated alias for html, retained for backward compatibility.

params.name: text
params.description: Plain text content to be used within the inset text body.

params.name: actionLink
params.description: Optional action link object with text, href, and attributes.

params.name: visuallyHiddenText
params.description: Optional override for the hidden accessible prefix.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the inset text.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the inset text.
